task_completion.description: Verify the document has a header with Protocol and Site numbers, and a footer with page numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top margin for 'ZN-994' and '142', and the bottom margin for page numbers in the OpenOffice Writer document.

task_completion.description: Verify the four required sections are present and use the 'Heading 1' style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Visit Details', 'Subject Enrollment', 'Protocol Deviations', and 'Action Items'. They should be visibly formatted as primary headings (larger, bold text) indicating 'Heading 1' style.

task_completion.description: Verify the Subject Enrollment section contains a table with the correct base counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table under 'Subject Enrollment' showing Screened (18), Randomized (14), Completed (3), and Discontinued (2).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Active' count in the Subject Enrollment table is correctly calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Active' category in the enrollment table. The value must be exactly 9.

task_completion.description: Verify the Protocol Deviations list and Action Items table structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a list under 'Protocol Deviations' and a table under 'Action Items' that specifically contains columns for 'ID', 'Description', 'Owner', and 'Status'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Action Items with an 'Open' status are conditionally formatted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Action Items table. Any row or cell with the status 'Open' (specifically AI-02 and AI-03) must have a yellow background highlight OR red text color.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Apache OpenOffice Writer to create the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenOffice Writer GUI being interacted with, not a terminal window running a script to generate the .odt file.

integrity.description: Verify the file is saved with the correct name.
integrity.visual_evidence: The title bar of the OpenOffice Writer window should display 'IMV_Report_Site_142.odt' or the save dialog should show this exact filename.

integrity.description: Verify that formatting is applied using word processor features, not plain text markdown.
integrity.visual_evidence: Headings should be actual rich text styles, and highlights/colors should be actual text properties, not raw markdown tags like '# Visit Details' typed into the document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Protocol Number: ZN-994. Site Number: 142. Enrollment counts from the input file: Screened=18, Randomized=14, Completed=3, Discontinued=2. The calculated 'Active' count must be exactly 9 (14 - 3 - 2 = 9). The Action Items table contains items AI-02 and AI-03 which have an 'Open' status and must be formatted with yellow highlight or red text. The four required sections are 'Visit Details', 'Subject Enrollment', 'Protocol Deviations', and 'Action Items'.
